name: claude-interrogate-mcp
description: A Socratic design-document interviewer for Claude Code, shipped as an MCP server and attachable from Codex via MCP.

scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run test:run
scripts.prepare:runtime-dist: npm run verify && npm run build && node ./scripts/prepare-runtime-dist.mjs && npm run check:release
scripts.prepare:distribution-repo: npm run verify && npm run build && node ./scripts/prepare-runtime-dist.mjs --sync-distribution-repo && npm run check:release
